title: Unn Badhil Vendi Song Lyrics Taramani
stanzas:
Unn badhil vendi
ugam pala thaandi
unmatham kondu
kaathiruppaeno

un iru paarvai
vilungindra tholaivil
vazhkindra yogam
naan adaiveno

vazhipokkan vazhvile
nizhalaaga varugiraai
naan kaetkkum munnamae
ilaipaaral tharugiraai
tharugiraai nee

ilaipaaral mudinthadhum
podhum po engiraai
puzhan aindhaiyum
kolgiraai kolgiraai
nee..

Unakkaaga naanum
kadal thaandi poven
malai mael oru
kadal vendumaa
mazhai kondu seivaen

kadal neelam serthu
kanavalli korthu
en moochinai
noolaakkiye
nagai ondru seivaen

veraarum engum
illaadha boomi
paarkaadha vaanam
naam vazha povoam

vazhipokkan vazhvile
nizhalaaga varugiraai
naan kaetkkum munnamae
ilaipaaral tharugiraai
tharugiraai nee

ilaipaaral mudinthadhum
podhum po engiraai
puzhan aindhaiyum
kolgiraai kolgiraai
nee..

Varugindra kaatril
pudhithaana vaasam
nodi nerathil
enai maattriye
maayangal seithaai

ethirpaartha ellaam
kai vittu poga
poi enbathaa
mei enbathaa
kaineetti vanthai

kurai ondrum illai
pirai meedhum karaigal
undendru solli
nee ingu vandhaai

vazhipokkanin vazhvile
nizhalaaga varugiraai
naan kaetkkum munnamae
ilaipaaral tharugiraai
tharugiraai nee

vidiyaadhoru naalile
adadaa en vaanile
velicham pol varugirai
vazhkaiye nee

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unn Badhil Vendi, the characters express their deep yearning for each other, reflecting the complexities of love and desire. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect fit for romantic moments. Set against the backdrop of Taramani, it enhances the emotional depth of the storyline, capturing the essence of relationships. The collaboration between Sruthi S and Yuvan adds a unique charm, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unn Badhil Vendi from Taramani is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With the enchanting voices of Sruthi S and Yuvan, this song takes you on an emotional journey that resonates deeply. The lyrical brilliance of Na Muthukumar combined with Yuvan's soulful composition makes this track a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: Am I waiting with my thoughts, seeking your response?
Is it my fate to be lost in your gaze?
You come into my life like a shadow, and I ask you to show me the way.
You say it's enough to end the silence, but you keep flowing like a river.
For you, I will cross the sea and bring rain from the mountains.
I will weave a smile from the ocean's blue and my breath.
You tell stories that no one believes, but I will make them real, my dear.
Let's not look at a world where no one exists; we will live in the sky.
You come into my life like a shadow, and I ask you to show me the way.
You say it's enough to end the silence, but you keep flowing like a river.
In the wind that is coming, you have changed my path and created illusions.
Let go of everything you see ahead; what is true is what you hold in your hands.
Today, I went to search for fish in the water, like a fish searching for water.
You came here saying there are no flaws, and even the moon has its scars.
You come into my life like a shadow, and I ask you to show me the way.
On a day that will never dawn, you come like light in my sky, my life.
